title: rubus × semialterniflorus
intro: Rubus × semialterniflorus, also known as the black raspberry or black thimbleberry, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × semialterniflorus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Rubus × semialterniflorus can be prepared into various herbal supplements, teas, and juices, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
